title: Ring + pinky: S, L, A — first words!
description: Ring fingers S and L, and the left pinky A — now you can make real words!
text: s s l l a a as as ask ask sad lad all fall salad
finger_focus: Ring fingers S/L and left pinky A

tips.text: S and L are ring fingers; A is your left pinky
Now you can spell real words!

tips.target: s s l l a a as ask
tips.hint: Ring fingers S/L and left pinky A
Ring fingers S/L and left pinky A

character_tips.anna: S, L and A — now you can write "ask" and "sad"! Real words ✨
character_tips.maxim: With A on board, real words appear: ask, sad, lad, all.
character_tips.knopych: WORDS! 🎉 ask, sad, lad — you're a writer!
character_tips.klavochka: Real little words now, my treasure 🌟 So clever!
